name: Holiday Hermits
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugars together until creamy.
2. Blend in eggs.
3. Sift together flour, soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk.
5. Stir in fruits, walnuts, and oats.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
